summary: Plan-only PR remediation classification for five independently scoped open pull requests using the provided cluster preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations are planned because closure/comment/label are blocked and merge preflight is incomplete for every PR.

actions.reason: Small focused contributor PR appears repairable/finalizable, but merge preflight is incomplete.
Useful contributor PR with maintainer_can_modify=true, but active author follow-up/status and missing hydrated review-bot resolution block merge recommendation.
Potentially useful but larger, higher-risk contributor PR needs branch repair and review/check resolution before any merge path.
Focused contributor PR appears repairable, but auth/session-state risk labels and missing merge preflight block merge recommendation.
Useful contributor PR appears near final but needs review-bot resolution and Codex /review proof before merge.

repair_candidate.summary: Each listed PR is an independent open contributor fix candidate. No canonical family/duplicate relation is established by the artifact. Recommend repair/finalization work on the contributor branches rather than replacement PRs, because every PR has maintainer_can_modify=true and no security-sensitive signal. Merge is blocked for all items by missing complete merge preflight, and #58373 also has failing checks.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair and finalize maintainer-ready PR inventory shard 145
repair_candidate.pr_body: Plan-only result: repair contributor branches where needed, run targeted tests, hydrate and address review-bot comments, run Codex /review, then emit merge actions only for PRs with complete merge_preflight. No replacement PR is recommended yet because all five source PRs are open and maintainer_can_modify=true.
credit_notes: Preserve credit for @mySebbe on #59920; also verify whether the co-authored/committed change by vincentkoc in #59920 requires attribution.
